TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Nana Akufo-Addo ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 3, Nana Akufo-Addo, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Ghana ta' misuw hya' ga Nana Akufo-Addo, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: nana aku*o-a**o rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, nana aku*o-a**o, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw …£ńßana ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a nana aku*o-a**o, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
